errors.PACK_SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_FIELD: pack.json contains unknown top-level field when additionalProperties=false.
errors.PACK_SCHEMA_VALIDATION_FAILED: pack.json failed JSON Schema validation constraints.
errors.BUNDLE_SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_FIELD: bundle.json contains unknown top-level field when additionalProperties=false.
errors.BUNDLE_SCHEMA_VALIDATION_FAILED: bundle.json failed JSON Schema validation constraints.
errors.BUNDLE_FILE_LOGICAL_KEY_MISSING: bundle logical key not present in pack files map.
errors.BUNDLE_FILE_HASH_MISMATCH: bundle declared hash does not match referenced file.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_FORMAT_INVALID: obt.jws is not a valid compact JWS payload.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_ALG_UNSUPPORTED: JWS alg is unsupported for OCI-1 baseline.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_KID_MISSING: JWS protected header kid is missing.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_KID_UNKNOWN: JWS kid does not match required trust key selection policy.
errors.BUNDLE_SIGNATURE_PAYLOAD_MISMATCH: JWS payload does not equal bundle.json.
errors.BUNDLE_TIME_WINDOW_INVALID: Bundle time window is invalid (nbf/exp malformed or exp<=nbf).
errors.BUNDLE_TIME_WINDOW_MISMATCH: Pack and bundle nbf/exp values do not match.
errors.BUNDLE_NOT_YET_VALID: Bundle nbf is later than evaluation clock.
errors.BUNDLE_EXPIRED: Bundle exp is at or before evaluation clock.
errors.BUNDLE_REV_EPOCH_MISMATCH: Pack and bundle revocation epoch values do not match.
errors.BUNDLE_REVOKED: Bundle revocation epoch is below required minimum epoch.
errors.OVL_CANONICAL_MISMATCH: Overlay precedence references are inconsistent with files map or deny-wins constraints.
errors.OVL_DENY_WINS_REQUIRED: Overlay precedence is present but deny-wins is not enabled consistently.
errors.OVL_AUTHORITY_EXPANSION_DENIED: Composed overlay result denies authority expansion attempt.
errors.OVL_COMPOSED_EFFECT_MISMATCH: Computed composed effect does not match asserted or expected effect.
errors.CASE_PATH_MISSING: Fixture case path does not exist.
